overview: Provides compensation to employees or their dependants for injury, occupational disease or death arising out of and in the course of employment.

definitions.definition: Employee covered under the Employees' Compensation Act.
Employer responsible for statutory compensation obligations.
Personal injury arising out of and in the course of employment.

rules.title: Review Applicability
rules.description: Determine whether the establishment has obligations under the Employees' Compensation Act.

rules.title: Provide Statutory Compensation
rules.description: Provide compensation where liability arises under the Act.

rules.title: Report Workplace Accidents
rules.description: Maintain and report workplace accidents wherever required under applicable law.

rules.title: Maintain Compensation Records
rules.description: Maintain records relating to compensation claims, payments and supporting documentation.

exceptions.title: Statutory Exceptions
exceptions.description: Compensation liability is subject to the provisions, exclusions and conditions prescribed under the Act.
